title: trichomanes nummularium
intro: Trichomanes nummularium, also known as Button Fern or Button Polypody, is a type of small, perennial fern native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Trichomanes nummularium include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat respiratory issues. Trichomanes nummularium can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, and it has also been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its therapeutic properties.
